  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Push battery reading history for a device"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/history/battery-readings/{deviceEui}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Push battery reading history for a device

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>

  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"deviceEui","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["readings"],"properties":{"resourceType":{"type":"string"},"resourceId":{"type":"string"},"readings":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["timestamp","derivedLevel","source","chemistry"],"properties":{"timestamp":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"voltage":{"type":"number","nullable":true},"level":{"type":"number","nullable":true},"derivedLevel":{"type":"number"},"source":{"type":"string"},"chemistry":{"type":"string"}},"title":"BatteryReading"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  responses={{"200":{"description":"Sync result","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"synced":{"type":"number"},"serverTotal":{"type":"number"}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request validation error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Missing/invalid credentials","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"403":{"description":"Insufficient permission","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}}}}
